changes.description: Added investigate import, module-level _verificationCache, verification state/handlers in IntelligenceField, VerificationCorridor + VerificationStepCard components, verification prop threading through RepresentationField to OPERATOR branch
Added VERIFY button and verification badge to SoftwareIntelligenceOperatorView header, target-gated entry, VERDICT_LABELS map
Added CSS for verification corridor overlay, verdict card, step cards, failure entries, replay card, verification badge, VERIFY button — all using semantic data-verdict attribute selectors
